posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
We love to hear about all the cool ways and industries that are using monday.com and this year, we want to highlight YOU, our community members!

Interested in being on the big screen in Times Square? Fill out this form by end of this week.

Now, envision yourself here:
